analysis.name: Hyperliquid
analysis.summary: HYPE近期因商品交易热潮和SpaceX永续合约上线等催化上涨，但24h回调2.7%，当前价格68.43美元，距ATH 76.7美元约11%。基本面强劲，但估值较高，需关注解锁和流动性风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破60美元或出现重大负面新闻（如安全漏洞、监管打击）

catalysts: 商品交易热潮推动DEX交易量增长
SpaceX永续合约上线，交易量达14亿美元
Arthur Hayes预测HYPE可能达到150美元
Hyperliquid成为加密‘链上华尔街’叙事

latestNews.title: Hyperliquid token surges 25% amid commodities trading frenzy
latestNews.reason: 商品交易热潮直接推动HYPE需求

latestNews.title: Hyperliquid Price Hits $74 as HYPE Clears $1.4 Billion in SpaceX Perps
latestNews.reason: SpaceX永续合约大额交易显示平台吸引力

latestNews.title: HYPE’s path to $100 runs through Hyperliquid becoming crypto’s on-chain Wall Street platform

fundamentals: Hyperliquid是L1区块链，主打永续合约和现货交易，生态包括借贷、RWA、EVM
HYPE最大供应量10亿，当前流通约2.22亿，流通市值152亿美元，FDV 653亿美元
市场排名第10，24h交易量4.33亿美元
marketRead: 当前价格68.43美元，距ATH 76.7美元约11%
risks: 解锁风险：总供应量10亿，流通仅2.22亿，未来解锁可能带来抛压
市场情绪波动：24h回调显示短期获利了结
依赖DEX交易量，若交易量下降可能影响价格
watchlist: 解锁时间表及代币释放情况
sourceNotes: Binance数据因地区限制无法获取，使用CoinGecko数据
新闻来源包括Yahoo Finance、StreetInsider等，时效性较好

profile.name: Hyperliquid
profile.description: Hyperliquid is a layer one (L1) blockchain best known for perpetual futures and spot trading. Beyond its flagship DEX trading platform, the ecosystem supports borrowing, lending, real world assets (RWAs), and a full-fledged Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), making it a leading force in decentralized finance (defi). Just as electronic trading dramatically improved markets in the 2000s, Hyperliquid offers an opportunity for a massive technical upgrade of the existing financial system through a transparent, efficient, and resilient blockchain. HYPE is the native token of the Hyperliquid blockchain, with a maximum supply of 1 billion.
